vulnerability.name: CVE-2026-34040
vulnerability.description: moby/dockerd authorization-plugin (AuthZ) bypass via oversized request body; daemon-side. Fixed in github.com/moby/moby 29.3.1.

statements.impact_statement: CVE-2026-34040 is an authorization-plugin (AuthZ) bypass in the moby/dockerd DAEMON. build-godynamic ships only the docker-compose CLIENT binary (built from github.com/docker/compose). It links client-side packages of github.com/docker/docker@28.5.2 -- dragged in transitively via github.com/docker/buildx -- but NOT the daemon AuthZ request-handling code, which is not present in the binary's call graph and never executes. No in-place fix exists: the 29.3.1 fix lives only on the github.com/moby/moby module path, while the legacy github.com/docker/docker module is frozen at 28.5.2 and buildx still pins it (even on master). Remediation is upstream-gated and tracked in docs/upstream-cve-backlog.md; drop this VEX statement and bump DOCKER_COMPOSE_VERSION once buildx drops github.com/docker/docker.
